<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static nameIf(bool $condition, string|null $name) * @method static nameIfNotNull(bool $condition, string|null $name) * @method static nameUnless(bool $condition, string|null $name) */ trait Name { /** * @param string|null $name * * @return static */ public function name($name) { return $this->attribute('name', $name); } }
